core_mechanism: mean-field / propagation-of-chaos limit: the empirical measure of many exchangeable stochastically interacting particles converges to the deterministic solution of a nonlinear evolution equation, with an explicit convergence rate quantified in an optimal-transport (Wasserstein) distance
brief_reason: The abstract proves an explicit convergence rate from the empirical measure of an interacting (Kac) particle system to the weak solution of the corresponding nonlinear evolution equation in Wasserstein-2 distance, which is precisely a quantitative propagation-of-chaos / mean-field limit.
